prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A border checkpoint gate with a sign reading "extends HasLength". A guard robot checks each type trying to pass. In the "approved" lane (green): a string character holding a ".length" badge passes through smiling, and an array character with its own ".length" badge follows. In the "rejected" lane (red): a number character without a length badge is stopped by a barrier arm, looking confused, with a red X above. The gate has a friendly but firm appearance. A small spec sheet on the guard's clipboard shows "must have: length property".
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
